image_13d02d0e8b3d53.png.note: 矩陣 A 的反矩陣記號
image_13d02d0e8b3d53.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"A^{-1}","note":"矩陣 A 的反矩陣記號"}

image_2195056e6985f6.png.note: 矩陣乘法結果不為零矩陣
image_2195056e6985f6.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\begin{bmatrix}0&0\\\\1&1\\end{bmatrix}\\begin{bmatrix}1&0\\\\0&0\\end{bmatrix}=\\begin{bmatrix}0&0\\\\1&0\\end{bmatrix}\\ne O","note":"矩陣乘法結果不為零矩陣"}

image_24a5adf1d4bb4f.png.note: 矩陣乘以向量的計算式

image_355374497dff54.png.note: 矩陣反元素與原矩陣相乘等於單位矩陣
image_355374497dff54.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"A^{-1}A=I","note":"矩陣反元素與原矩陣相乘等於單位矩陣"}

image_3f9f63a0827046.png.note: 推出 m 為 1 或 -1
image_3f9f63a0827046.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\Rightarrow m=1\\text{或}-1","note":"推出 m 為 1 或 -1"}

image_5db1bc825bf3b2.png.note: 矩陣乘法結果為零矩陣

image_6aaabf8974c9cd.png.note: 二階矩陣反矩陣公式的一部分
image_6aaabf8974c9cd.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"=\\begin{bmatrix}\\frac{d}{ad-bc}&\\frac{-b}{ad-bc}\\\\\\frac{-c}{ad-bc}&\\frac{a}{ad-bc}\\end{bmatrix}","note":"二階矩陣反矩陣公式的一部分"}

image_6d856ad126dc87.png.note: 推出 m 平方等於 1
image_6d856ad126dc87.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\Rightarrow m^2=1","note":"推出 m 平方等於 1"}

image_73255fd5eca070.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\frac{1}{2}\\begin{bmatrix} b & -a \\\\ -9 & 4 \\end{bmatrix}\\begin{bmatrix} 4 & a \\\\ 9 & b \\end{bmatrix}=\\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & 1 \\end{bmatrix}","note":"矩陣乘法等式"}

image_822ac660775d16.png.note: 矩陣乘以零向量等於零向量
image_822ac660775d16.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\begin{bmatrix}a&b\\\\c&d\\end{bmatrix}\\begin{bmatrix}0\\\\0\\end{bmatrix}=\\begin{bmatrix}0\\\\0\\end{bmatrix}","note":"矩陣乘以零向量等於零向量"}

image_8dabd60abfbc67.png.note: 四元乘積項的聯立方程式

image_97c2812a6bd844.png.note: 矩陣反解表示二元一次方程組解
image_97c2812a6bd844.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\begin{bmatrix}x\\\\y\\end{bmatrix}=\\begin{bmatrix}a&b\\\\c&d\\end{bmatrix}^{-1}\\begin{bmatrix}e\\\\f\\end{bmatrix}","note":"矩陣反解表示二元一次方程組解"}

image_96ac5623fb500e.png.note: 向量 u 的導數或標記
image_96ac5623fb500e.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\vec{u}'","note":"向量 u 的導數或標記"}

image_9e9e9702a37118.png.note: 矩陣乘以單位矩陣反矩陣

image_a1caa1a70a1c7b.png.note: 矩陣相乘等於單位矩陣
image_a1caa1a70a1c7b.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\begin{bmatrix} b & -a \\\\ -9 & 4 \\end{bmatrix}\\begin{bmatrix} 4 & a \\\\ 9 & b \\end{bmatrix}=\\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\\\ 0 & 1 \\end{bmatrix}","note":"矩陣相乘等於單位矩陣"}

image_ac19a5e8b372a3.png.note: 純數學式：b等於負四分之三

image_a48aa8b91b42e0.png.note: 矩陣與零向量相乘等於零向量
image_a48aa8b91b42e0.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\begin{bmatrix}2&1\\\\0&-k\\end{bmatrix}\\begin{bmatrix}0\\\\0\\end{bmatrix}=\\begin{bmatrix}0\\\\0\\end{bmatrix}","note":"矩陣與零向量相乘等於零向量"}
